meaning: adj.不宽恕的,不屈不挠的,无情的,冷酷的
examples: She established her authority with unrelenting thoroughness.
He was unrelenting in his search for the truth about his father.
And you've also faced the breakneck, unrelenting climb of costs for your health care needs.
That was more than 30 years ago, and the disease has been unrelenting and cruel.
